zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Thorolde於1466年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可恩哈姆 馬尼亞時，她的父親John Thomas Thorolde22歲，母親Alice Annie Staunton24歲。她於1492年與Sir John Waller在英國英格蘭素福爾可沃薩姆結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1538年在英國英格蘭素福爾可沃薩姆享年72歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可沃薩姆。

nameMeanings.name: Thorolde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Anglo-Norman and Middle English personal name T(h)urold, T(h)orold, T(h)orald (Old Scandinavian Þóraldr). The initial T is due to the Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Th-. Torald and Torold became Toraud and Toroud, giving the modern surname Torode. This name may have become confused with Tyrrell , Turrill , and Torrell .

variants.name: Tyrrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): perhaps a nickname from a derivative of Old French tirer ‘to pull’, in the same sense as French Tirand ‘one who pulls on the reins’, hence ‘obstinate, stubborn’. This name may have become confused with Turrell . A branch of this Anglo-Norman family has been in Ireland since the 12th century. Its name has been Gaelicized as Tirial.
English: habitational name from Tirril (Cumbria), which derives from Old Norse tyri ‘resinous wood’ + erg ‘shieling’.

variants.name: Turrell
meanings: most frequently an Anglo-Norman French pronunciation of Thorold (Old Norse Thóraldr, from the elements Thórr ‘Thor’ + valdr ‘power, rule’). This name and that in 2 may have become confused with Tyrrell .
from Middle English T(h)urild (Old Norse Thórhildr, Thorild, the latter a rare woman's name from the divine name Thórr ‘Thor’ + hildr ‘battle’).

variants.name: Torrell
meanings: 1 English: (i) nickname from Old French torel ‘young bull’. See also Torr . Some of the bearers below may belong under (2). (ii) variant of Turrell .
2 English: locative name for someone who lived or worked at a lime kiln or a malt kiln (Middle English torel, Old French toraile ‘little tower, kiln’).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Thorolde was born in 1466, in Thornham Magna, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Thomas Thorolde, was 22 and her mother, Alice Annie Staunton, was 24. She married Sir John Waller in 1492, in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1538, in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Wortham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Thorolde est née en 1466, à Thornham Magna, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Thomas Thorolde, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice Annie Staunton, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Waller en 1492, à Wortham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1538, à Wortham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Wortham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Thoroldeが1466年にイギリスイギリススフォルクソルンハム マグナで生まれた時，父John Thomas Thoroldeは22歳，母Alice Annie Stauntonは24歳であった。1492年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウオルサムでSir John Wallerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1538年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウオルサムで72歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクウオルサムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Thorolde(이)가 1466년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 토른함 매그나에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Thomas Thorolde(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Annie Staunton(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1492년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 워섬에서 Sir John Waller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1538년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 워섬에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 워섬에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Thorolde родилась в 1466 г. в местности таурнам магна, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Thomas Thorolde было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Annie Staunton, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Waller в 1492 г. в местности вортам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1538 г. в местности вортам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности вортам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
